title: Design System: Bossie's Gym & Personal Training Studio

display.purpose: Homepage hero headline only — the one shout per page load.

headline.purpose: Interior page-hero H1s, always with eyebrow above and description below.

body.purpose: Paragraph copy, capped to a comfortable measure by the section container.

label.purpose: Eyebrows, tags, and button text — the only 0.25em letter-spacing in the system.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Default resting shadow under any raised panel.

shadows.name: glow
shadows.purpose: Primary-button hover and any element claiming "this is the action."

shadows.name: glow-lg
shadows.purpose: Featured/active state for a card competing for attention.

shadows.name: soft
shadows.purpose: Light separation for panels that shouldn't compete for attention.

motion.name: drift
motion.purpose: Slow ambient float on decorative hero blobs/orbs.

motion.name: drift-slow
motion.purpose: Slower variant of drift for a second, offset blob.

motion.name: pulseRing
motion.purpose: Continuous pulse ring around the sticky WhatsApp FAB — the system's one ambient, non-hover-gated motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main conversion CTA (Join Online, Start a Free Trial).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; min-height: 48px; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 12px 20px; background: #dc2b38; color: #f5f6fa; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.12em; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s, transform 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #f4535f; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(220,43,56,0.45), 0 10px 40px -10px rgba(220,43,56,0.35); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f4535f; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action beside a primary CTA (e.g. Call).
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; min-height: 48px; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 12px 20px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: #f5f6fa; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.12em; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f4535f; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: WhatsApp Button
components.description: Single-use WhatsApp click-to-chat CTA — the only place WhatsApp Green appears.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-whatsapp"><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M21 11.5a8.38 8.38 0 0 1-.9 3.8 8.5 8.5 0 0 1-7.6 4.7 8.38 8.38 0 0 1-3.8-.9L3 21l1.9-5.7a8.38 8.38 0 0 1-.9-3.8 8.5 8.5 0 0 1 4.7-7.6 8.38 8.38 0 0 1 3.8-.9h.5a8.48 8.48 0 0 1 8 8v.5z"></path></svg>WhatsApp Us</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-whatsapp { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; min-height: 48px; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 12px 20px; background: #25D366; color: #05070d; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.12em; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s; } .ds-btn-whatsapp:hover { background: #1ebb5a; } .ds-btn-whatsapp:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-whatsapp:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f4535f; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Card Surface
components.description: Default raised panel — flat at rest, lifts with a red-tinted glow on hover.
components.html:
Personal Training

Real coaching, every session.

One-on-one programming that adapts to where you actually are.
components.css: .ds-card { position: relative; border-radius: 1.25rem; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(10,13,22,0.8), rgba(5,7,13,0.8)); padding: 24px; transition: transform 0.3s ease-out, box-shadow 0.3s ease-out, border-color 0.3s ease-out; } @media (hover: hover) { .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(220,43,56,0.32), 0 22px 50px -22px rgba(220,43,56,0.45), 0 12px 40px -16px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); } } .ds-card-eyebrow { display: inline-flex; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.25em; color: #ff8d96; } .ds-card-title { margin-top: 12px; font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', 'Archivo Black', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: clamp(1.35rem, 3vw, 2.25rem); line-height: 1.08; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #f5f6fa; } .ds-card-body { margin-top: 12px; color: #c4c9d8; line-height: 1.625; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text input used across the contact and onboarding forms.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; min-height: 48px; border-radius: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); padding: 14px 16px; font-size: 0.95rem; color: #f5f6fa; transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #8a90a5; } .ds-input:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: rgba(220,43,56,0.6); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(220,43,56,0.3); }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Header navigation link with an animated underline on hover/active.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { position: relative; display: inline-flex; padding: 4px 0; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #c4c9d8; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-nav-link::after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; bottom: -0.35rem; width: 100%; height: 2px; border-radius: 999px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(220,43,56,0.15), rgba(244,83,95,0.95)); transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left; transition: transform 220ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #f5f6fa; } .ds-nav-link:hover::after, .ds-nav-link-active::after { transform: scaleX(1); } .ds-nav-link-active { color: #f5f6fa; }

components.name: Eyebrow Label
components.description: Uppercase tracked label used above page-hero headlines.
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.25em; color: #ff8d96; }

components.name: Tag / Chip
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); padding: 4px 12px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.18em; color: #c4c9d8; }

narrative.overview: This is a gym that opens at 5am and doesn't dress that up. The system reads as a real training floor under work lights, not a SaaS landing page wearing a fitness skin: a near-black base that's deliberately not true black, lit from two directions — Bossie Red from the logo's own wordmark, Steel Crest blue from the muscular figures in the crest — both pulled directly from the client's real logo, never invented. The personality is friendly, minimal, energetic, community-focused. That means confident typography and real glow effects, but restraint everywhere else: flat surfaces at rest, generous fluid spacing instead of dense stacking, and exactly one move per interaction rather than a pile of simultaneous effects. The system explicitly rejects corporate big-box-gym blandness and influencer-fitness hype pages.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black base (#05070d), never true black — calm, not gothic
Two-color glow system: red dominant, steel-blue secondary, used with restraint
Barlow Condensed display + Barlow body — single sport-coded family at two optical widths
Flat by default; glow and lift are interaction rewards, not ambient decoration
Fluid clamp() scales everywhere — type and spacing breathe across viewport instead of stepping at breakpoints

rules.name: The Two-Glow Rule
rules.body: Only Bossie Red and Steel Crest ever glow. No third accent color is introduced for variety.

rules.name: The Single-Use Green Rule
rules.body: WhatsApp Green exists only on the WhatsApp CTA — never reused as a generic success/live color elsewhere.

rules.name: The One-Shout Rule
rules.body: Display scale appears exactly once per page load — the homepage hero. Every interior page hero uses Headline scale instead.

rules.name: The Hover-Earns-It Rule
rules.body: No shadow appears at rest beyond the minimum needed for legibility. Glow and lift are always a response to hover or focus-visible.

dos: Do keep the base near-black (#05070d), never pure #000.
Do reserve Display scale for exactly one headline per page — the homepage hero.
Do gate all elevation (glow, lift) behind :hover / :focus-visible.
Do keep WhatsApp Green scoped to the WhatsApp CTA only.
Do disable hover-lift transforms and reduce animation durations under prefers-reduced-motion.
donts: Don't add a third glow color.
Don't use fake testimonials, stock-photo gloss, or invented stats/credentials anywhere.
Don't let the site drift toward corporate big-box-gym blandness or influencer-fitness hype/hard-sell patterns.
Don't use border-left/border-right colored stripes as a card accent.
Don't ship a tiny uppercase eyebrow above every single section as a reflex.
